title: Minibank
notConfigured: Connect Phantom / Solflare; use Devnet in wallet (or match VITE_SOLANA_RPC)
accountExists: Account already exists for this wallet
accountNotFound: Account not found. Create one first
walletDisconnected: No wallet: connect a browser wallet or use local keypair in .env
deleteNonZero: Close failed: account balance is not zero. Withdraw to zero first
txFailed: Transaction failed. Check params and try again
rpcBalanceMismatchHint: SOL is read via the RPC URL above. Wrong cluster is the usual issue: Phantom on Testnet while the app uses Devnet (or the reverse)—not the same chain, balance often looks like 0. Any Devnet RPC (public, Alchemy, Helius, etc.) points at the same Devnet ledger; switching providers alone should not zero out a balance.
balanceTwoAddressesHint: Without Phantom, a funded VITE_LOCAL_KEYPAIR_JSON address may show a balance; after connecting, the app uses your Phantom address—different pubkey, different balance (often 0 if you never airdropped that wallet on Devnet). Disconnect to use the local key again.
addressMismatchHint: Phantom address ({{phantom}}) does not match your .env keypair address ({{local}}); SOL shown is for Phantom. If it differs from what you saw while disconnected, switch to the matching account in Phantom or verify VITE_LOCAL_KEYPAIR_JSON matches id.json.
